# Entity Analytics receiver

The Entity Analytics receiver syncs identity data (users, devices, groups)
from external identity providers and emits it as logs. It uses the
[entcollect](https://github.com/elastic/entcollect) shared library for
provider sync logic and state management.

## Output format

This receiver emits **ECS-formatted documents** in the log record body.
The output is intended for Elastic ingest pipelines that expect entity
analytics documents. It does not follow the OTLP data model — if you are
building a generic OTel pipeline, this receiver's output will not match
standard OTLP log conventions.

Each log record carries the full entity document in the body as a map,
with ECS-compatible fields set by the provider (e.g. `user.name`,
`device.id`). Log record attributes include `event.action`,
`event.kind`, `asset.type`, and `labels.identity_source`.

## Architecture

The receiver resolves an `entcollect.Registry` from a storage extension
(e.g. `elasticsearchstorage`) at startup via runtime type assertion.
This avoids a compile-time dependency on beats. Provider implementations
register themselves at init time via blank imports.

On startup, the receiver runs an immediate full sync, then enters a
timer loop alternating between full syncs (default: every 24 hours) and
incremental syncs (default: every 15 minutes). Each sync writes provider
state into a buffer; the buffer is committed on success and discarded on
error.

## Configuration

```yaml
receivers:
  entity_analytics:
    provider: "entra_id"
    storage: "elasticsearch_storage"
    sync_interval: 24h
    update_interval: 15m
```

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `provider` | string | (required) | Identity provider name. Must match a registered provider. |
| `storage` | string | (required) | Component ID of the storage extension implementing `entcollect.Registry`. |
| `sync_interval` | duration | `24h` | Interval between full syncs. |
| `update_interval` | duration | `15m` | Interval between incremental syncs. |

The receiver requires a storage extension that implements
`entcollect.Registry`. In the intended deployment, this is the
`elasticsearchstorage` extension from the Elastic Agent OTel
distribution.

## Status

This receiver is in **development** stability. The Jamf provider is
registered. Further providers (Okta, EntraID, Active Directory) will
be added in subsequent work.
